title: ADN-261 I Was Booked Into The Same Room With My Married Woman Colleague On Our Business Trip... And We Had Hot And Intense Sex Until The Break Of Dawn. Shihori Kotoi
description: 'Shiori' suffers from a jealous husband. While her husband's bondage is getting worse year by year ... Shiori is exhausted from her marriage. Meanwhile, on a day trip, a mistake in ordering Shiori was discovered. Being chased by mistakes, Shiori ends up staying on a business trip with his boss Mizuki. However, only one room could be secured. After a long absence, Shiori, who was alone with a man other than her husband, couldn't hide the screaming of her chest ...
